zh.lifeSummary: 當Richard Harrington於1401年出生在英國藍卡爾布拉可洛德時，他的父親Sir James Harington32歲，母親Ellen DeUrswick37歲。他於1420年與Elizabeth de Bradshagh在英國英格蘭藍卡爾維斯特利結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1467年8月17日在英國藍卡爾維根 哥吉拉 沙智享年66歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭藍卡爾蘭卡斯特。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Richard Harrington于1401年出生在英国藍卡爾布拉可洛德时，他的父亲Sir James Harington32岁，母亲Ellen DeUrswick37岁。他于1420年与Elizabeth de Bradshagh在英国英格兰藍卡爾維斯特利结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1467年8月17日在英国藍卡爾維根 哥吉拉 沙智享年66岁，埋葬在英国英格兰藍卡爾蘭卡斯特。

nameMeanings.name: Harrington
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of the three places called Harrington (Cumberland, Lincolnshire, Northamptonshire). The Cumberland placename derives from the Old English personal name Hæfer + Old English connective -ing- + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’. The Lincolnshire placename derives from the Old English personal name Hearra + Old English connective -ing- + tūn. The Northamptonshire derives from an Old English personal name Hǣthhere + Old English connective -ing- + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’. Compare Herendeen .
Irish: adopted as an Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó hArrachtáin ‘descendant of Arrachtán’, a personal name from a diminutive of arrachtach ‘mighty, powerful’.
Irish: in Kerry, this name was adopted as an Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó hIongardail, later Ó hUrdáil, ‘descendant of Iongardal’, a personal name of uncertain origin.

variants.name: Herington
meanings: English: variant of   Harrington   or   Herrington  .

variants.name: Herrington
meanings: habitational name from Heronden in Tenterden (Kent) or Herrington in Houghton (Durham). The Kent placename may derive from an Old English personal name Hȳra + Old English connective -ing- + denn ‘pasture’, while the Durham placename may come from Old English hæring ‘rocky place’ (from hær ‘rock, heap of stones’ + the placename forming suffix -ing) or hæren ‘rocky’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’.

variants.name: Arrington
meanings: variant of Harrington with loss of initial H-.
possibly a habitational name from Arrington, a place in Cambridgeshire, named from an Old English byname, Earn(a), meaning ‘eagle’ + -inga- ‘people or followers of’ + tūn ‘settlement’.

nameMeanings.name: Richard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the most enduringly successful of the Old French personal names introduced into Britain by the Normans. It is of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from rīc ‘power’ + hard ‘strong, hardy’. It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. Nevertheless, he achieved the status of a folk hero, and was never in England long enough to disappoint popular faith in his goodness and justice. He was also Duke of Aquitaine and Normandy and Count of Anjou, fiefs which he held at a time of maximum English expansion in France. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Richard Harrington was born in 1401, in Blackrod, Lancashire, England, his father, Sir James Harington, was 32 and his mother, Ellen DeUrswick, was 37. He married Elizabeth de Bradshagh in 1420, in Westleigh, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. He died on 17 August 1467, in Wigan All Saints, Lancashire, England, at the age of 66, and was buried in Lancaster, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Richard Harrington est né en 1401, à Blackrod, Lancashire, Angleterre, son père, Sir James Harington, avait 32 ans et sa mère, Ellen DeUrswick, avait 37 ans. Il a épousé Elizabeth de Bradshagh en 1420, à Westleigh, Lancashire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé le 17 août 1467, à Wigan All Saints, Lancashire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 66 ans, et a été enterré à Lancaster, Lancashire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Richard Harrington 1401 in Blackrod, Lancashire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir James Harington 32 und seine Mutter Ellen DeUrswick 37. Er hat 1420 in Westleigh, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom Elizabeth de Bradshagh geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 17. August 1467 im Alter von 66 Jahren in Wigan All Saints, Lancashire, England und wurde in Lancaster, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Richard Harrington è nato il nel 1401 nel Blackrod, Lancashire, England, il suo padre, Sir James Harington, aveva 32 anni e il suo madre, Ellen DeUrswick, aveva 37 anni. Lui sposato Elizabeth de Bradshagh nel 1420, nel Westleigh, Lancashire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia. Morì il 17 agosto 1467, nel Wigan All Saints, Lancashire, England, all'età di 66 anni, e fu sepolto a Lancaster, Lancashire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Richard Harringtonが1401年にイギリスランカシュアイアブラクロドで生まれた時，父Sir James Haringtonは32歳，母Ellen DeUrswickは37歳であった。1420年にイギリスイギリスランカシュアイアウエストレイグでElizabeth de Bradshaghと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1467年8月17日にイギリスランカシュアイアウィガン アル サインツで66歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスランカシュアイアランカスターにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Richard Harrington(이)가 1401년 영국 랭카실르 블랙로드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir James Harington(은)는 32세였고, 그의 어머니 Ellen DeUrswick(은)는 37세였다. 그는 1420년 영국 잉글랜드 랭카실르 웨스틀리에서 Elizabeth de Bradshagh(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1467년 8월 17일 영국 랭카실르 위건 앨 세인츠에서 66세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 랭카실르 랭커스터에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Richard Harrington nasceu em 1401, em Blackrod, Lancashire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir James Harington, tinha 32 anos e sua mãe, Ellen DeUrswick, tinha 37 anos. Ele casou-se com Elizabeth de Bradshagh em 1420, em Westleigh, Lancashire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 17 de agosto de 1467, em Wigan All Saints, Lancashire, Inglaterra, com 66 anos, e foi sepultado em Lancaster, Lancashire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Richard Harrington родился в 1401 г. в местности блэккрод, ланкашир, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir James Harington было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Ellen DeUrswick, 37. Он женился на женщине по имени Elizabeth de Bradshagh в 1420 г. в местности вестлиг, ланкашир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер 17 августа 1467 г. в местности виган алл сеинц, ланкашир, Англия в возрасте 66 лет и был похоронен в местности ланкастир, ланкашир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Richard Harrington nació en 1401, en Blackrod, Lancashire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir James Harington, tenía 32 años y su mamá, Ellen DeUrswick, tenía 37 años. Se casó con Elizabeth de Bradshagh en 1420, en Westleigh, Lancashire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija. Murió el 17 de agosto de 1467, en Wigan All Saints, Lancashire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 66 años, y fue sepultado en Lancaster, Lancashire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
